nasb.text: Therefore, thus says the Lord, “Behold, I am laying stumbling blocks before this people. And they will stumble against them, Fathers and sons together; Neighbor and friend will perish.”

esv.text: Therefore thus says the Lord: ‘Behold, I will lay before this people stumbling blocks against which they shall stumble; fathers and sons together, neighbor and friend shall perish.’”

cnv.text: 因此，耶和華這樣說： “我要把絆腳石放在這人民的前面， 他們父子一起在其上絆倒， 鄰舍與朋友也都滅亡。”

ccb.text: 因此，耶和华说： “我要把绊脚石放在他们前面， 使父子一同绊倒， 邻居和朋友一同灭亡。”
